buffs.Wit's End Description: Deals level-scaled magic damage on basic attacks and grants movement speed.
buffs.Liandry's Torment Description: Dealing ability damage burns the target, and deals increased damage over time in combat.
buffs.Liandry's Torment Combat Description: Damage is amplified while in combat.
buffs.Blade of the Ruined King Description: Basic attacks deal physical damage based on target's current health. The third attack slows the target and deals magic damage.
buffs.Blade of the Ruined King Stacks: Blade of the Ruined King Stacks
buffs.Blade of the Ruined King Stacks Descript: Stacks to trigger additional effect on the third attack.
buffs.Blade of the Ruined King Cooldown: Blade of the Ruined King Cooldown
buffs.Blade of the Ruined King Siphon Slow: Blade of the Ruined King Siphon Slow
buffs.Spellblade (Lich Bane) Description: After using an ability, the next basic attack deals bonus magic damage.
buffs.Lich Bane Cooldown Description: Cooldown of the Lich Bane Spellblade effect.
buffs.Spellblade (Trinity Force) Description: After using an ability, the next basic attack deals bonus physical damage.
buffs.Trinity Force Cooldown Description: Cooldown of the Trinity Force Spellblade effect.
buffs.Luden's Companion Charges Description: Consumes charges to deal bonus magic damage when damaging with an ability.
